title: Timeline Entry
description: A temporal marker indicating progression of in-game time (season transitions, time references, biological markers, construction milestones).

source_turn.description: Turn ID where this temporal marker was detected.

season.description: The season referenced by this marker, with early/mid/late granularity.

estimated_day.description: Estimated day offset from the reference anchor (can be negative for pre-anchor events).

anchor_ref.description: The reference anchor this estimate is relative to (e.g. 'day-0' or 'foundation').

signals.description: Temporal signals that informed this estimate.

description.description: Human-readable description of the temporal transition.

raw_text.description: The original text that triggered temporal detection.
